case_title: LONNY LEE BRISTOW VS. MARNEY METZ

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED , AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-08-2003 AT 10:30AM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: SUSAN LEE. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

Off Calendar May-08-2003 Dismissal
